operation.name: ucli.cs.eval
operation.description: Compiles and executes C# source in the Unity Editor process.

assurance.planSemantics: Compile the supplied C# source and validate the required entry point without invoking user code.
assurance.callSemantics: Compile, emit, load, and execute the user C# entry point inside the Unity Editor process.
assurance.touchedContract: Reports touched resources declared by user code through the eval context; declarations are caller-controlled and are not a complete guarantee of all Unity state changes.
assurance.readPostconditionContract: Scene, prefab, asset, ProjectSettings, and readIndex surfaces may be stale after eval execution regardless of declared touched resources.
assurance.failureSemantics: Compilation and entry-point failures occur before user code runs; once synchronous user code is invoked it cannot be forcibly stopped until it returns or throws.
dangerousNotes: Executes user C# inside the Unity Editor process and can mutate project state outside declared touched resources.
Synchronous user code cannot be forcibly stopped while it is executing.

entryPoint.matchRule: Compiled source must contain exactly one matching Run method.

members.name: Log
members.description: Records an informational eval log entry.
